arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Valladolid vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Valladolid in La Liga. This game gives Real Madrid a good opportunity to earn the three points in convincing fashion, as Valladolid have been quite poor so far this season.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham goes public with new girlfriend Ashlyn Castro during loved-up outing
arts.sum: England and Real Madrid star player Jude Bellingham has been spotted with girlfriend Ashlyn Castro after she lovingly watched him from a box while he played on the pitch

arts.ttl: How Real Madrid will possibly line up in LaLiga against Valladolid
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has received a boost ahead of the team’s next La Liga match, with Lucas Vázquez returning to the lineup . His week has been marked by inconsistency—he sat out the match against Las Palmas, played against RB Salzburg, and will now miss the Valladolid game, along with the final Champions League group stage match against Brest.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid credited with interest in Aston Villa star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have this weekend been credited with an interest in the signature of a member of the attacking ranks at Aston Villa. The player in question?…

arts.ttl: How Como plan to remove Real Madrid’s clause for Nico Paz
arts.sum: Serie A side Como are working with Real Madrid to remove the clauses in his permanent deal. According to a report by Giulio Saetta of La Gazzetta dello Sport, Como…

arts.ttl: Valladolid vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Valladolid, which is just a few kilometers away from the Spanish capital, in what should be a fairly manageable away game for Los Blancos. Can Real Madrid keep their momentum going?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ready to pay big money for “great player” doing an “amazing job” at Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are interested in signing the Arsenal defender William Saliba. According to a report from Fichajes, they are desperate to improve their defensive unit because of the constant injury problems at the back. Eder Militao and David Alaba have struggled with persistent injury problems and signing a quality central defender is a top priority […] The post Real Madrid ready to pay big money for “great player” doing an “amazing job” at Arsenal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ready to offer Endrick in swap deal for Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Real Madrid are interested in signing Aston Villa attacker Jhon Duran, according to Foot Mercato. The Colombian attacker has been in fine form this season and some of the biggest clubs in the world are keen on securing his services. arts.ttl: Real Madrid target €100m Jhon Duran: Aston Villa already know his replacement
arts.sum: Real Madrid are the latest club to raise an interest in Aston Villa attacker Jhon Duran, who has had a €100 million price tag put on his head this January. Real Madrid target €100m Jhon Duran: Aston Villa already know his replacement

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Valladolid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s away match against Valladolid in LaLiga. No significant news on Real Madrid’s front other than Lucas Vazquez’s return to the squad list.
